dj_text: From Camila Cabello - Havana [Medieval Style Cover] to Coldplay - Hymn for the Weekend [Age of Empires Style Medieval Cover]. The vibe shift is violent. Good. And then there was one. Last track after this.
commercial_text: Breaking news from That Pirate Bot DJ — the playlist is in control now. The DJ has been demoted to button-pusher.
hijack_text: Truth Frequency Radio from the Mirror Dimension.
recovery_text: What the— who gave them our frequency?! That's the THIRD kosmos this week!
title: Coldplay - Hymn for the Weekend [Age of Empires Style Medieval Cover]
